masterPasswordPrompt_description: Please enter your Master Password to use the extension. This password is very important, do not forget it!
masterPasswordPrompt_verifyDescription: Please re-enter your Master Password to continue your session.
masterPasswordPrompt_pwnedWarning_intro: WARNING: This Master Password has been found in previous data breaches!
masterPasswordPrompt_pwnedWarning_recomm: It is strongly recommended to choose a different and stronger password.
masterPasswordPrompt_pwnedWarning_questi: Do you still want to proceed with this password?
masterPasswordPrompt_error_generic: An error occurred while checking the password. Please try again.
message_sessionActive: Master Password verified and session active.
message_profileCreatedAndPdwGenerated: Profile "{{profileName}}" created for '{{siteName}}' and password generated.
message_autofillAttempted: Attempted to fill form fields. Please check the page.
error_masterPasswordRequired: Please start the session by entering your Master Password first.
error_activeTabNotFound: Active tab not found or has no ID.
error_clipboardUnsupported: Copying to clipboard is not supported in this browser.
error_dataExport: An error occurred while exporting data.
error_fileRead: An error occurred while reading the file.
savedSitesList_noProfiles: No saved sites or profiles yet.
savedSitesList_confirmDeleteProfile: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the "{{profileName}}" profile for '{{siteUrl}}'? This action cannot be undone.
passwordOutput_autofillButton_disabledTi: No active page URL to fill
settings_exportData_description: Export all your saved site and profile information (unencrypted) to a JSON file. You can keep this file as a backup or move it to another device.
settings_importData_description: Import data from a previously exported JSON file. This will merge with your existing data (profiles with the same ID will be updated).
settings_importData_confirm: Importing data will merge with your current data. Are you sure you want to continue?
